name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-86
title: test/test-rabbit-config.py: feature.json check for rabbit-set-threshold is loose (substring) — passes if removed correctly but doesn't verify what the schema actually requires
description: test/test-rabbit-config.py t4 (lines 56-67) parses feature.json and checks 'cmds = d.get("surface", {}).get("commands", [])' then 'bad = [c for c in cmds if "rabbit-set-threshold" in c]'. Since feature.json surface.commands is currently [] (empty per Inv 29), no items to iterate so bad is always []. The test passes vacuously. Replace with explicit assertion: surface.commands == [].
